selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be proactive in identifying and flagging false information. This can be done by using fact-checking tools and sources, as well as by reporting suspicious content to the platform or account responsible. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of one's own biases and to seek out multiple sources of information to gain a more complete understanding of a topic. By taking these steps, individuals can help to promote a more informed and engaged online community.","reasoning_summary":"To determine the validity of content on social media, we use fact-checking tools and sources to analyze the information. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be proactive in identifying and flagging false information. This can be done by using fact-checking tools and sources, as well as by reporting suspicious content to the platform or account responsible. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of one's own biases and to seek out multiple sources of information to gain a more complete understanding of a topic. By taking these steps, individuals can help to promote a more informed and engaged online community.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To determine the validity of content on social media, we use fact-checking tools and sources to analyze the information. We also report suspicious content to the platform or account responsible. To combat our own biases, we seek out multiple sources of information. By taking these steps, we can help promote a more informed and engaged online community.
